case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS JAMES, DEBORAH A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $648.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES, DEBORAH A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES, DEBORAH A.
